---
name: Document
about: Creating a new document
title: "[DOCUMENT]"
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
type: Task

---

**Document Title** 
What do we call this document?

**Document Category** 
Policy, Operating Procedure, Training material, Quick reference, Other etc.

**Target Audience**
Who are supposed to read this document?

**Rationale**
Why do we need this document? What problem does it solve?

**Outline**
What are the main sections this document will cover?

**Research**
Do we have the sources to write this already? Do we need to research more?
